pull.title: guix: re-enable riscv exported symbol checking
pull.body:
Switching to binutils `2.46.0` fixes the spurious exported symbols (2.45.1 was still broken). 
Will find the relevant upstream change. 
No updates on our upstream issue: https://sourceware.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=32783.

Fixes #28095.

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | Concept ACK | [trevarj](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34757#issuecomment-4106910097) | | Stale ACK | [hebasto](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34757#pullrequestreview-4015011610) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts No conflicts as of last run.

ACK

would be nice to get guix to bump the version too 🥲
Not a blocker, but it would be nice to bisect this, to see which commit fixed this, and possibly leave a comment in the upstream bug report that it was fixed and can be closed?
ACK 604e6798fb3e27559ef6b8b4e1ed983c418fdbcb, I have reviewed the code and it looks OK.
